name: Pilbara Minerals Limited
description: Pilbara Minerals is a leading Australian lithium-focused mining company that owns and operates the world-class Pilgangoora Operation in Western Australia's Pilbara region. As one of the largest independent hard-rock lithium operations globally, it produces spodumene and tantalite concentrates. The company is a key player in the global electrification supply chain, providing essential raw materials for the lithium-ion battery industry. Pilbara Minerals is committed to sustainable growth through production expansion, downstream processing initiatives, and strategic partnerships to maximize value from its resource base.
